history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. The goal is at (3,3). Moving forward to (1,2) is safe and brings me closer to the goal. Then I can continue right and then down to reach the goal, avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row2, col3) facing right. The goal is at (row4, col4) based on the map. Moving forward will take me to (row2, col4), which is an empty floor cell, bringing me closer to the goal. From there, I can turn and move down to reach the goal while avoiding the lava at (row3, col3).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,4) facing right. The goal is at (4,4). To move towards the goal, I need to go down. Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move forward to (3,4) and then to (4,4) which is the goal. So I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (row2, col4) facing down. The goal is at (row4, col4), two steps below. The cell directly ahead (row3, col4) is empty (floor), so I can safely move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing down. The goal is directly below me at (3,3). There are no obstacles in front, so I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
